name: Prismic
description: Headless page builder CMS with slice-based visual editing for marketing teams

description.value: Headless page builder CMS with slice-based visual editing for marketing teams

repository.comment: Closed-source SaaS; Slice Machine and client libraries are open source on GitHub

license.comment: Core platform is proprietary SaaS; Slice Machine and SDKs are Apache-2.0

initial-release.comment: Founded in 2013 by Guillaume Bort and Sadek Drobi in Paris, France

github-stars.comment: Closed-source core; prismic-client has ~176 stars, slice-machine is open source

deployment-model.comment: SaaS-only platform; Slice Machine runs locally but requires Prismic backend

primary-language.comment: SDKs and Slice Machine are TypeScript; backend is proprietary

database-support.comment: Proprietary content storage; no user-accessible database

api-type.comment: REST API (primary) and GraphQL API both available; GraphQL is read-only

multi-tenancy.comment: Multiple repositories per account; pricing is per-repository

static-site-generation.comment: Works with all major SSG frameworks via API; official integrations for Next.js, Nuxt, SvelteKit

edge-deployment.comment: Images served via imgix CDN; API responses cached globally

content-types.comment: Custom Types defined via Slice Machine; Page Types, Custom Types, and Slices

field-types.comment: Boolean, Color, Content Relationship, Date, Embed, Geopoint, Image, Integration, Link, Number, Repeatable group, Rich Text, Select, Table, Text, Timestamp, UID

content-relationships.comment: Content Relationship field for linking documents

nested-components.comment: Slices are the core building blocks; repeatable groups within slices

localization.comment: Multi-language content with locale management in Page Builder

content-validation.comment: Field validation rules for required fields, character limits

embedded-interactives.comment: Embed field supports oEmbed URLs (YouTube, Vimeo, Soundcloud); Integration field for external data

content-versioning.comment: Full revision history with rollback capability; Environments for safe iteration

draft-publish.comment: Draft and published states with auto-save

scheduled-publishing.comment: Releases feature for scheduling multiple page changes at once

approval-workflows.comment: Approval process control for content review before publishing

content-locking.comment: Real-time collaboration with field-level presence indicators showing who is editing

audit-logging.comment: Track which team member made changes and when

image-transformations.comment: imgix integration for on-the-fly transformations: resize, crop, format (WebP, AVIF), quality, filters

external-media-storage.comment: Media stored in Prismic; no native S3 or Cloudinary integration for storage

video-support.comment: Via Embed field for YouTube, Vimeo; no native video upload/streaming

svg-support.comment: SVG files supported in media library

role-based-access.comment: Team members with permissions; custom roles available

granular-permissions.comment: Content-type level permissions available on higher tiers

sso-saml.comment: Single Sign-On available on Enterprise tier

team-collaboration.comment: Real-time collaboration with multiplayer editing; field-level presence indicators

audience-restrictions.comment: Content delivery is API-based; access control implemented in frontend application

typescript-sdk.comment: @prismicio/client with full TypeScript support; auto-generated types via Slice Machine

content-type-sdk.comment: Slice Machine enables code-first content modeling with JSON schema files

cli-tools.comment: prismic-cli for project setup, slice creation, and development

local-development.comment: Slice Machine runs locally for content modeling; connects to Prismic API

plugin-system.comment: Integration Fields for external data; custom slices for extensibility

admin-ui-customization.comment: Page Builder customization via Slices; limited compared to fully customizable studios

documentation-quality.comment: Good documentation with framework-specific guides, dark mode, searchable; comprehensive API reference

frontend-frameworks.comment: Deep official integrations with Next.js, Nuxt, and SvelteKit; SDKs for React, Vue, Svelte

search-integration.comment: Algolia integration documented; no built-in search

preview-mode.comment: Live previews in frontend with Slice Simulator; full-website previews

ecommerce-integration.comment: Integration Fields for connecting e-commerce catalogs and external APIs

analytics-integration.comment: No built-in analytics; integrate via frontend application

ai-features.comment: Image to Slice (AI-powered), Figma to Prismic Slice; AI-assisted slice generation from designs

cdn-included.comment: imgix CDN for images; global API delivery

response-caching.comment: API responses cached; CDN caching for content delivery

rate-limits.comment: Free/Starter/Small: 4M/month; Medium: 5M; Platinum: 10-50M; 200 requests/second rate limit

free-tier.comment: Free tier for developers building personal sites or proof of concept; limited users

open-source.comment: Core platform is proprietary; Slice Machine and SDKs are open source (Apache-2.0)

pricing-model.comment: Free, Starter ($15/mo), Growth, Scale, Business, Platinum ($675), Enterprise; per-repository pricing

commercial-support.comment: Support included on paid plans; Enterprise tier with dedicated support

enterprise-features.comment: SSO, unlimited users (Platinum+), environment cloning, advanced security
